sections.paragraph:
μεγαλύνω [μέγας]

—1. enlarge Mt 23:5 (in ref. to size); Lk 1:58 (in ref. to amount).

—2. ‘cause to gain recognition’, aggrandize, celebrate, glorify Lk 1:46; Ac 5:13 (speak highly of); 10:46; 19:17; Phil 1:20. Prob. 2 Cor 10:15 belongs here (Paul seeks increased recognition for appropriate procedure in advertising the gospel), but many place it in 1.
